name: Peeking Goblin
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>盗</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぬす</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>み<ruby lang="jp"><rb>見</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>み</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ゴブリン
desc: Your opponent reveals the top 3 cards of their Deck. Choose one to place on the bottom of the Deck and place the other two on top of the Deck in any order.
eff: Your opponent reveals the top 3 cards of their Deck. Choose one to place on the bottom of the Deck and place the other two on top of the Deck in any order.

action: Places excavated cards on the top of the Deck
Places cards from the opponent's Deck on the top of the Deck
Places excavated cards on the bottom of the Deck
Places cards from the opponent's Deck on the bottom of the Deck
